title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, uses AI skills to automate work. The video covers three strategies: agents, hooks, and loops/scheduling, along with decision frameworks for what becomes a skill and identification of underutilized Claude Code features.
